prestazioni: L87 6.2L V8 (3107cc) forced-induction build with a BorgWarner EFR 9280 turbocharger (1.05 A/R, 76mm compressor, 80mm turbine) running 22 psi on a custom Precision Turbo wastegate, paired with a Kenne Bell 4.5L Mammoth supercharger (2.8L pulley) for hybrid boost response, mated to a Holley Dominator EFI ECU with custom fuel mapping for E85 compatibility and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump system

Darton Sleeved L87 block with Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression), and a billet steel crankshaft from Callies Compstar (4.000" stroke), paired with a COMP Cams solid roller camshaft (248/254 duration @ 0.050", 0.650" lift) and Jesel belt-driven valvetrain with titanium retainers and PAC Racing valve springs

Custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Stainless Works with 304-grade merge collectors, Borla Pro XS mufflers (resonated), and a MagnaFlow 3.5-inch cat-back section, paired with a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate and a custom intercooler setup by CX Racing (1200hp-rated bar-and-plate core, 4.5" end tanks) with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump
estetica: Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (Type 3, carbon fiber fenders with 3.5" flares) paired with a custom front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 4" overhang) and a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-piece with integrated LED lighting)

Forgiato Trakan 24x12 ET-15 forged wheels (matte black, 5x135mm lug pattern) wrapped in Nitto Ridge Grappler 35x12.50R24LT tires, paired with KW Suspension Variant 5 coilovers (remote reservoirs, 12-way adjustable damping) and Eibach Pro-Spacer 25mm wheel spacers for flush fitment

Custom matte military green vinyl wrap by 3M (2080 series, satin finish) with exposed carbon fiber hood by Seibon (Type 5, vented) and a custom LED light bar integrated into the grille by Baja Designs (Squadron Pro, amber/yellow combo), paired with a custom bed cage by C4 Fab (6061 aluminum, powder-coated black) and a BakFlip MX4 tonneau cover (matte black, low-profile)
